debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂θ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
-- Analogous to partials_helper0 but for the outer rotation.
  -- The key fact (outer analog of partials_helper0a):
  -- The derivative of rotproj_outer_unit P w at outerParams in direction (single 0 1)
  -- equals ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫.
  -- This follows from: rotproj_outer_unit = ‖P‖⁻¹ • (⟪rotM(·)⋅P, w⟫),
  -- the chain rule (fderiv_const_smul), and the fact that the partial derivative
  -- of rotM(θ,φ)⋅P w.r.t. θ is rotMθ(θ,φ)⋅P.
  have key : (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_outer_unit P pc.w) pbar.outerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1) =
      ‖P‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotM₂θ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    sorry
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, Fin.isValue, key]
  by_cases hP : P = 0
  · subst hP; simp [ContinuousLinearMap.map_zero]
  · have hP_ne : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := norm_ne_zero_iff.mpr hP
    rw [← mul_assoc, mul_inv_cancel₀ hP_ne, one_mul]
